items.text: Oil prices look to end at highest levels in over a week: ‘Oil tanks are getting emptier each week Hormuz stays closed’
items.summary: Oil futures were on track to settle Wednesday at their highest levels in more than a week, after the EIA reported a sixth straight weekly drop in U.S. commercial crude supplies and another big draw from the nation’s emergency oil reserve.
items.text_it: I prezzi del petrolio sembrano terminare ai massimi livelli in oltre una settimana: "I serbatoi del petrolio si svuotano ogni settimana che Hormuz rimane chiusa"
items.summary_it: I futures sul petrolio erano sulla buona strada per stabilirsi mercoledì ai livelli più alti in più di una settimana, dopo che l'EIA ha riportato un sesto calo settimanale consecutivo delle forniture commerciali di greggio degli Stati Uniti e un'altra grande attrazione dalla riserva petrolifera di emergenza della nazione.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: The Iran war hasn’t slowed the economy, but higher inflation leads companies to freeze hiring
items.summary: The largest part of the economy grew faster in May, even as businesses were coping with the worst inflation in several years — at a cost to job seekers. Many companies have adopted temporary hiring freezes to offset their own rising costs.
items.text_it: La guerra in Iran non ha rallentato l'economia, ma l'aumento dell'inflazione porta le aziende a congelare le assunzioni
items.summary_it: La maggior parte dell'economia è cresciuta più velocemente a maggio, anche se le imprese stavano affrontando la peggiore inflazione degli ultimi anni, con un costo per chi cercava lavoro. Molte aziende hanno adottato il congelamento temporaneo delle assunzioni per compensare i propri costi in aumento.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: The hottest stock market in the world has doubled this year. And Goldman Sachs sees another 40% gain from here.
items.summary: Earnings are the principal driver behind the breathtaking rallies achieved by Korean and Taiwanese benchmark indices in 2026, and Goldman Sachs thinks the market is still underestimating the longevity of the chip cycle.
items.text_it: Il mercato azionario più caldo del mondo è raddoppiato quest' anno. E Goldman Sachs vede un altro guadagno del 40% da qui.
items.summary_it: I guadagni sono il principale motore dei rally mozzafiato raggiunti dagli indici di riferimento coreani e taiwanesi nel 2026 e Goldman Sachs ritiene che il mercato stia ancora sottovalutando la longevità del ciclo dei chip.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: Investors would be crazy to turn bearish on stocks now, says veteran strategist. In six months, maybe not.
items.summary: Marco Papic is worried about where stocks are headed in six to 12 months from now, with massive tech IPOs a big part of that concern.

items.summary: Marco Papic is worried about where stocks are headed in six to 12 months from now, with massive tech IPOs a big part of that concern.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: A stark new warning about the global economy: Inflation is headed higher and growth lower
items.summary: Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development now anticipates a worldwide inflation rate of 4% this year.
items.text_it: Un nuovo forte avvertimento sull'economia globale: l'inflazione è diretta verso l'alto e la crescita verso il basso
items.summary_it: L'Organizzazione per la cooperazione e lo sviluppo economico prevede ora un tasso di inflazione mondiale del 4% quest' anno.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: Wall Street hated these 15 stocks. Then their earnings proved the analysts wrong.
items.summary: Earnings beats mean a lot more when it happens to stocks the market gave up on.
items.text_it: Wall Street odiava questi 15 titoli. Poi i loro guadagni hanno dimostrato che gli analisti si sbagliavano.
items.summary_it: I guadagni battono significano molto di più quando si tratta di azioni a cui il mercato ha rinunciato.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: Oil prices climb for a third straight day as peace-deal hopes teeter
items.summary: WTI crude futures have risen nearly 10% in three days as hopes for a quick peace deal fade.

items.text: Trump Aims New Tariffs at 59 Countries and the European Union
items.summary: Trump administration officials said they planned to impose levies of up to 12.5 percent on countries that failed to crack down on goods made with forced labor.

items.text: New Intelligence Role Puts Bill Pulte’s Housing Agenda in Doubt
items.summary: Mr. Pulte has had difficulty boosting the housing market as head of the Federal Housing Finance Agency. Now he will also serve as acting intelligence director.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: My sister, mother and I are giving my son $20,000 toward a down payment. Do we report it to the IRS?
items.summary: “I’m confident that I will never exceed the lifetime gift-tax exemption.”

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: The hottest stock market in the world has doubled this year. Now Goldman Sachs sees another 40% gain from here.
items.summary: Earnings are the principal driver behind the breathtaking rallies achieved by Korean and Taiwanese benchmark indices in 2026, and Goldman Sachs thinks the market is still underestimating the longevity of the chip cycle.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: Investors would be crazy to turn bearish on stocks now, says veteran strategist. In six months, maybe not.
items.summary: Marco Papic is worried about where stocks are headed in six to 12 months from now, with massive tech IPOs a big part of that concern.
items.text_it: Gli investitori sarebbero pazzi a diventare ribassisti sulle azioni ora, afferma lo stratega veterano. Tra sei mesi, forse no.
items.summary_it: Marco Papic è preoccupato per la direzione in cui si dirigeranno le azioni tra sei o 12 mesi, con massicce IPO tecnologiche che rappresentano gran parte di tale preoccupazione.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: Oil prices climb for a third straight day as peace-deal hopes teeter
items.summary: WTI crude futures have risen nearly 10% in three days as hopes for a quick peace deal fade.
items.text_it: I prezzi del petrolio salgono per il terzo giorno consecutivo mentre le speranze di pace vacillano
items.summary_it: I futures sul greggio WTI sono aumentati di quasi il 10% in tre giorni mentre le speranze di un rapido accordo di pace svaniscono.
